title: Roy Orbison: Black and White Night 30
original_title: Roy Orbison: Black and White Night 30
overview: Black and White Night 30 is a re-imagined, re-edited, remastered and expanded version of the original television special. Re-edited by Roy's youngest son Alex Orbison, the program has been restored to reflect the correct set order as the audience who attended the show saw it.
